name: bedrock-bridge-copilot
displayName: AWS Bedrock Bridge for Copilot Chat
description: Access AWS Bedrock models (Claude, Llama, Nova, DeepSeek) inside GitHub Copilot Chat with streaming, tool calling, and custom model support.
author: Abhimanyu <abhimanyus1997@gmail.com>

aws-bedrock.enableNative.description: Enable native AWS Bedrock models via the Converse API (uses your AWS credentials, not the Mantle API key)

enumDescriptions: Use API key from AWS Bedrock Console (simpler, no AWS CLI setup needed)
Use AWS credentials/profile (better for existing AWS setups)

aws-bedrock.mantleAwsProfile.description: Optional AWS named profile to use for Mantle when using AWS credentials auth. Leave empty to use the default AWS credential chain.

aws-bedrock.awsProfile.description: Optional AWS named profile to use for native Bedrock (Converse). Leave empty to use the default AWS credential chain.

aws-bedrock.region.description: AWS region for Bedrock (Mantle and native)

aws-bedrock.showAllModels.description: Show all available models including specialized variants (like safeguard models)

aws-bedrock.debugLogging.description: Enable verbose debug logging to the 'AWS Bedrock' Output Channel

aws-bedrock.sendTools.description: Send tool definitions to the model (disabling can improve latency and avoid very large requests)

aws-bedrock.emitPlaceholders.description: Emit placeholder text like 'Thinking…' or '(Waiting for model output…)' into chat while waiting

aws-bedrock.modelMetadataSource.description: Where to source model capability + token limit metadata. 'litellm' uses a public registry; 'none' uses built-in heuristics + runtime probing only.

aws-bedrock.modelMetadataUrl.description: URL for external model metadata (used when modelMetadataSource=litellm)

aws-bedrock.modelMetadataCacheHours.description: How long to cache external model metadata (hours). 0 disables caching and always refetches.

aws-bedrock.customModels.description: Additional custom model IDs, ARNs, or inference profiles to make available in the extension. Can be strings (e.g. "us.anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022-v2:0") or objects specifying capabilities.

modelId.description: The exact Bedrock model ID, ARN, or Inference Profile ID (e.g. 'us.meta.llama3-2-3b-instruct-v1:0')

displayName.description: Friendly name to show in the model list

supportsVision.description: Does the model support image input?

supportsToolCalling.description: Does the model support tool calling?

aws-bedrock.showTokenUsage.description: Append a summary of token usage (input and output tokens) at the end of each Copilot Chat response.
